dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9503 IH: Officer Leslie Coffelt U.S. Secret Service Police Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Rutherford (for himself, Mr. Case, Mr. Guest, and Mr. Moskowitz) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Judiciary

form.official-title: To change the name of the United States Secret Service Uniformed Division to the United States Secret Service Police.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Officer Leslie Coffelt U.S. Secret Service Police Act of 2026.

subsection.text: Section 201 of the District of Columbia Police and Firemen's Salary Act Amendments of 1970 (2 U.S.C. 1942) is amended by striking Uniformed Division and inserting Police each place it appears.
Title 5, United States Code, is amended—

subparagraph.text: in the header, by striking Uniformed Division and inserting Police; and
in sections 10201, 10202, and 10203, by striking Uniformed Division and inserting Police each place it appears;

paragraph.text: in section 4521, by striking Uniformed Division and inserting Police each place it appears;
in section 5102, by striking Uniformed Division and inserting Police each place it appears;
in section 6324, by striking Uniformed Division and inserting Police each place it appears; and
in section 7103, by striking Uniformed Division and inserting Police each place it appears.

subsection.text: Section 2674 of title 10, United States Code, is amended by striking Uniformed Division and inserting Police each place it appears.
Title 18, United States Code, is amended—

subparagraph.text: in the header by striking Uniformed Division and inserting Police; and
by striking Uniformed Division and inserting Police each place it appears; and

paragraph.text: in section 709, by striking Uniformed Division and inserting Police.

subsection.text: Section 540C of title 28, United States Code, is amended by striking Uniformed Division and inserting Police each place it appears.
Section 1537 of title 31, United States Code, is amended by striking Uniformed Division and inserting Police each place it appears.
